<!--
PR Title Format: <type>(<scope>): <description>

Examples:
  ✅ feat(auth): add password reset flow
  ✅ fix(hooks): resolve race condition in session-start
  ✅ docs(readme): update installation steps
  ✅ refactor(scripts): consolidate file I/O helpers

Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore, style, perf
Scope: Component/feature area (skills, agents, hooks, scripts, etc.)
Description: Imperative mood, concise (50 chars or less)
-->
